long_description:
NRE were alerted of link flaps between ngcs054.2.sr03.lon06 Et15/1 <-> ngas06.sr03.lon06 Et2/0/7. Raising this INC to track progress.


https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19859
short_description: ngas06.sr03.lon06 Et2/0/7, et-2/0/7 <-> ngcs054.2.sr03.lon06 Et15/1 | Link Flap
